name: Trooper 1
short_description: Trooper 1 Is a 3d Sidescroller You are a cyborg and you must stop the invasion of terrorists.
detailed_description:
Trooper1


This is a fun to play sidescroller in 3d style.
Can you kill them all and can you get to the end, i challenge you!.


The Update is now life,Better Textures beter aiming and more, we hope you like it,Have fun!!


Controls

A = Left
S = Crouch
D = Right
F = Action Button
Shift = Sprint or Jump over
Q & E = Weapon select
Tab = Melee Kick or Left Right Focus
1 = Game-Menu

Mouse Controls

Left Mouse = Shoot
Right mouse = First Person Shooting
Scroll Button = Stealth Kill
